<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace PhpParser\Node\Stmt; use PhpParser\Node\Stmt; class HaltCompiler extends Stmt { /** @var string Remaining text after halt compiler statement. */ public string $remaining; /** * Constructs a __halt_compiler node. * * @param string $remaining Remaining text after halt compiler statement. * @param array<string, mixed> $attributes Additional attributes */ public function __construct(string $remaining, array $attributes = []) { $this->attributes = $attributes; $this->remaining = $remaining; } public function getSubNodeNames(): array { return ['remaining']; } public function getType(): string { return 'Stmt_HaltCompiler'; } }
